From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Association football club in Namibia

Football club

Ongos SC

**Ongos Valley FC** is a [Namibian football](/wiki/Football_in_Namibia "Football in Namibia") club based in [Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"). It competes in the [Namibia Premier Football League](/wiki/Namibia_Premier_Football_League "Namibia Premier Football League").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Ongos_SC&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

Ongos SC was founded as Tura Magic Sports Club. In summer 2023 the club was purchased and renamed Ongos FC after the Ongos Valley. At that time, former [Brave Warriors](/wiki/Namibia_national_football_team "Namibia national football team") coach [Ricardo Mannetti](/wiki/Ricardo_Mannetti "Ricardo Mannetti") was named Sporting Director.[[2]](#cite_note-Magic_Sports_Club_takeover-2)
